hierarchy.h1: font-['Unbounded'] text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black
hierarchy.h2: font-['Unbounded'] text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold

layout_and_spacing.card_style: bg-[#121212] border border-[#27272A] rounded-none relative overflow-hidden

motion_and_interactions.animations: Use Framer Motion for entrance staggers. Build a custom CSS keyframe for the glowing border tracing effect (Tracing Beam).

icons_and_assets.style: Use Duotone or Regular weight. No chunky filled icons.

login_hero_bg.description: Dark server room. Apply an 85% opacity #050505 overlay over this so it acts as an atmospheric texture rather than a distracting image.

threat_abstract.description: Binary code light projection, use as a subtle background for the Multi Device Simulator or Suspicious Activity alerts.

testing.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, toggles, nav links) and key informational displays (trust scores, hashes) MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. ENFORCE DARK THEME: The entire application must be strictly dark mode (#050505 base). Do not use pure white backgrounds anywhere.

2. TYPOGRAPHY: Import the Google Fonts and apply 'Unbounded' for all headings. Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for paragraphs/UI text, and 'JetBrains Mono' for hashes, blockchain ledgers, and live entropy streams. DO NOT use 'Inter'.
3. BORDERS & RADII: Use 'rounded-none' or max 'rounded-sm' (2px/4px). This is an enterprise security tool; sharp edges feel precise and technical. Avoid soft, bubbly UI.
4. NEON GLOWS: Apply 'Tracing Beam' or glowing borders (e.g., border-[#00FF66]/50 with a subtle drop shadow) only to active or highly trusted elements. Use `#FF3B30` for spoofed device alerts.

5. ENTROPY VISUALIZATION: For the 'Entropy Engine Visualization', create an animated component (using CSS animations, framer-motion, or raw SVG) that simulates a live, jagged waveform or hash stream in neon green.

6. BLOCKCHAIN LEDGER: Style the 'Blockchain Trust Ledger' as a dense, command-line/terminal style table. Left-align columns. Use grid-borders (1px bottom/right borders on cells) for a structural, raw data look.
7. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn components but strip away their default 'Vercel-look'. Force background colors to #121212, borders to #27272A, and ensure focus rings are #00FF66.
8. ICONS: Install and use Phosphor Icons. Use technical, linear iconography.
9. CONTRAST: Ensure text on pure black meets 4.5:1 contrast. Use '#F3F4F6' for primary text, '#9CA3AF' for secondary text.
10. RESPONSIVE GRID: Use the 'Control Room' dense grid strategy for the dashboard view. No jagged bottoms; use h-full to stretch cards.
